commit_scope: Admit the native metal and Hati target emit pass cluster to the fourth-arm manifest, raising the fkwu floor from 129 to 134 covered bands without changing kernel behavior.

commands: cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh asm-pl-human-emit hati-os-native-cli-emit hati-os-targets metal-emit form-macho
local_validation.notes: The refreshed survey on the post-#3006 floor showed 97 already-passing bands outside the manifest and kept the node/substrate family as the largest blocked cluster. This slice admits only the non-overlapping native metal/emit pass cluster. The focused fourth-arm gate returned PASS-4WAY for asm-pl-human-emit, hati-os-native-cli-emit, hati-os-targets, metal-emit, and form-macho. Full Form validation returned 'fourth arm: 134 band(s) four-way' and '555 ok, 0 divergent'.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet. GitHub checks will be monitored after PR creation.

deploy_validation.summary: No deployment triggered by this commit. Production was aligned to origin/main before this slice started; public verification follows merge/deploy if deployment runs.

phase_gate.gate: Native target/emit shape bands are listed in the fourth-arm manifest and pass through Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu.
phase_gate.next: Push PR, wait for checks, merge when checks allow, then continue to the next fourth-arm pass or blocked-op family without overlapping active coord claims.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The fourth-arm floor now includes Hati OS target coordinates, native CLI emit, human-readable asm emit, Mach-O object shape, and generic metal emit rows. The change is a manifest/docs/evidence admission of rows that already measured as fkwu pass candidates.
test_flows: Focused fourth-arm gate reports PASS-4WAY for all five admitted rows.
Full form validate.sh reports 134 fourth-arm bands and 555 ok / 0 divergent across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and covered fkwu bands.
bml_form_jit_metal_planes_audit.sh passes macOS arm64 Mach-O and Android arm64 ELF object receipts for bml-hati, form-jit, and form-jit-lowered surfaces.

macos_arm64: PASS plane=macos-arm64 surface=bml-hati target=arm64-apple-macosx object=Mach-O 64-bit object arm64
PASS plane=macos-arm64 surface=form-jit target=arm64-apple-macosx object=Mach-O 64-bit object arm64
PASS plane=macos-arm64 surface=form-jit-lowered target=arm64-apple-macosx object=Mach-O 64-bit object arm64
android_arm64: PASS plane=android-arm64 surface=bml-hati target=aarch64-linux-android object=ELF 64-bit LSB relocatable, ARM aarch64
PASS plane=android-arm64 surface=form-jit target=aarch64-linux-android object=ELF 64-bit LSB relocatable, ARM aarch64
PASS plane=android-arm64 surface=form-jit-lowered target=aarch64-linux-android object=ELF 64-bit LSB relocatable, ARM aarch64
macos_android_evidence.android_floor: Android may package a clang-like compiler binary later as optional oracle/acceleration proof, but this floor continues to rely on Form-native recipe/table execution and Android arm64 target receipts.

e2e_validation.summary: The native metal/emit cluster raises the manifest floor to 134 four-way bands while preserving 555 ok / 0 divergent suite behavior and the Android minimum JIT floor without requiring a bundled runtime compiler.
